user.title: Unavailable & Low Battery Alerts
user.description: Configure notification services. All fields are optional — you can also set or change these later via the Lovelace dashboard.

data_description.mobile_services: Comma-separated service names, e.g. mobile_app_my_phone, mobile_app_partners_phone
data_description.smtp_service: Leave blank to skip email, e.g. smtp
data_description.gate_entity: Entity that must be 'on' before notifications send; leave blank to always notify, e.g. input_boolean.im_home

abort.already_configured: Unavailable & Low Battery Alerts is already configured.

init.title: Notification Settings
init.description: Update notification configuration. Changes are applied on the next check.

data_description.smtp_service: Leave blank to skip email, e.g. smtp
data_description.gate_entity: Entity that must be 'on' before notifications send; leave blank to always notify
